body_txt: Works of fiction frequently portray the effects of magnetism in a way that is inconsistent with Real Life . This can be because the writer did not do the research or because the "different" magnetism is a plot device. In video games, magnetism can be functionally equivalent to Inconveniently Placed Conveyor Belts . In comedic works, magnetism can be required by the Rule of Funny . There are several ways that magnetism in a work can differ from magnetism in Real Life : Subset of Artistic License – Physics . Often overlaps with Selective Magnetism and sometimes Magnetism Manipulation , but there are distinct differences:
